name: the live wrapper keeps only guidance that mentions the technology, dropping unrelated lines from a general source
command: ID=L561A02; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/acquire-technology-live.sh" --technology Vue --project $ID --cache fc --now 2026-07-05T00:00:00Z >/dev/null 2>&1; DESCS=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/aggregator.sh" --project $ID --format json 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'puts JSON.parse(STDIN.read)["rules"].select{|x|x["origin"]=="project"}.map{|x|x["description"]}.join("|")'); rm -rf "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards"/_project/$ID; echo "$DESCS" | grep -qi vue && ! echo "$DESCS" | grep -qi 'no framework mention' && echo live-filters-mentions 1>&2
setup: mkdir -p fc && printf '%s\n' 'Type Vue props explicitly.' 'Prefer plain TypeScript functions for Vue composables.' 'A line with no framework mention.' > fc/typescript-handbook.txt
